message:
fix(codegen): Resolve numeric test compile errors

- Fix random.zig getrandbits to handle k=0-64 properly with u7 input
  and u6 shift amount cast
- Add UnifiedInt.toDecimalString method for string conversion
- Fix int_ops.zig intBuiltinCall to handle class instances with
  __int__/__index__ methods instead of treating them as strings
- Fix arithmetic.zig to check UnifiedInt BEFORE BigInt for proper
  type dispatch order
- Add getattr special case in assertRaises to bypass block expression
- Fix tearDown calls to not use catch {} on void-returning methods
- Add string type check before parseIntUnicode path in int_conv.zig

All 6 baseline tests pass (80 test cases).
